Case# CTFontManagerAutoActivationSetting.promptUser

macOS 10.6–10.13Deprecated

```
case promptUser
```

Deprecated

Deprecated

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/ctfontmanagerautoactivationsetting/promptuser#Discussion)

Requires user input for auto-activation. A dialog is presented to the user to confirm auto-activation of the font.
